name: Top Aviation
description: Top Aviation specializes in comprehensive ground handling solutions for the aviation industry, offering services such as ramp handling supervision, computerized passenger handling, and crew transportation. With a commitment to personalized service and safety, Top Aviation positions itself as a reliable partner for clients seeking excellence in aviation support.

name: AN Aviation Services
description: AN Aviation is a prominent ground handling and flight support company in Egypt and the UAE, authorized by CAA Egypt and GCAA UAE. They offer a comprehensive range of high-quality aviation services, including ground handling, flight planning, and fuel arrangements, making them a key player in the aviation sector in Africa and the Middle East.

name: Egyptian Aviation Services E.A.S
description: Egyptian Aviation Services S.A.E. is a key player in the aviation sector, providing various services related to air travel and airport operations, including specialized aircraft sanitization.

name: Aviation for Aviators
description: Aviation for Aviators is an online platform that educates and engages individuals interested in the aviation industry, making it a valuable resource for both enthusiasts and professionals.

name: Aviary.Aero
description: Aviary is a specialized ground services provider in the aviation industry, offering a wide range of services such as ground handling, catering, and transportation at Egyptian airports. With over 25 years of experience, the company is committed to delivering professional and reliable aviation services tailored to the needs of its clients and partners.

name: Aerojet -services
description: Aerojet Services is dedicated to transforming the aviation industry with a wide array of services such as ground handling, logistics, and elite charter programs. Their focus on innovation, safety, and customer satisfaction ensures a seamless travel experience for airlines and private clients alike.

name: Tiger Aviation Services
description: Tiger Aviation Services (TAS) is a prominent player in the aviation sector, providing comprehensive ground handling support for various aircraft types and flights in Egypt. With 25 years of experience, TAS offers a wide range of services, ensuring reliable and quality support 24/7 across multiple Egyptian airports.

name: Set Aviation
description: The company, Set Aviation, is a dedicated service provider in the aviation and aerospace industry, offering high-quality customer service and tailored solutions for airline companies. Their mission is to exceed customer expectations by creating unique and reliable travel experiences, with a strong emphasis on safety and continuous improvement.

name: AviSpares Defense LLC
description: AviSpares is a prominent player in the aviation industry, offering a wide array of products and services such as spare parts, engine repairs, and maintenance for both civil and military aircraft. Their commitment to high-quality solutions and partnerships with key industry stakeholders highlights their expertise in aviation technology and services.

name: HighWayAviationBroker
description: Highway Aviation specializes in private aviation services, featuring a fleet that includes the Global 7500 and Gulfstream G450, both known for their long-range capabilities.

name: AirBankco
description: The company specializes in the aviation sector, providing tailored aircraft leasing solutions for football teams and their fans, as well as a wide range of aircraft spare parts. Their services include wet, damp, and dry leases, addressing the operational needs of various clients.

name: SKY N JET
description: SKY N JET is a prominent aviation services company that specializes in comprehensive flight support and management, catering to various sectors including commercial airlines, cargo, and private jets. Their extensive offerings encompass ground handling, flight permits, flight planning, and catering, ensuring exceptional safety and quality throughout all operations.

name: World Sky Aviation
description: WORLD SKY AVIATION is a prominent player in the aviation sector, offering extensive training programs for aspiring pilots, in collaboration with aviation schools in the U.S. and South Africa. The company emphasizes high educational standards and professional English coaching, preparing students for successful careers in the aviation industry.

name: World Air Operations
description: World Air Ops is a specialized flight support provider that offers a wide range of services essential for aviation operations, including permits, ground handling, fueling, and international trip planning. Their expertise and trusted service make them a key player in the aviation sector, catering to airlines, government entities, and private clients.

name: Sky team Aviation Academy
description: Sky Team Aviation is an Egyptian aviation academy that specializes in comprehensive pilot training, offering programs such as Private Pilot License (PPL) and Commercial Pilot License (CPL). The academy adheres to strict international protocols, ensuring a thorough training syllabus that prepares aspiring pilots for professional careers in aviation.

name: Z Aviation Services ZAS
description: ZAS is a specialized service provider in private and business aviation support, offering a wide range of services such as executive handling, FBO, aircraft refueling, and in-flight catering across over 30 airport locations. They also manage commercial flight handling and technical support, emphasizing efficient and safe operations tailored to the needs of passengers, cargo, and crews.

name: EGYPTAIR TRAINING ACADEMY
description: EGYPTAIR TRAINING ACADEMY is a prominent training provider in the aviation sector, offering a wide array of programs for flight crew, cabin crew, and technical training, among others. Located at Cairo Airport, the Academy ensures high-quality training for personnel from Egypt and around the world, making it a key player in the aviation industry.

name: ALKAN AIR
description: Alkan Air, established in 1997, specializes in luxurious aviation services, offering full maintenance for various aircraft and on-demand support across the Middle East and North Africa. Their certifications and status as a Textron authorized service center enhance their capability to provide exclusive and efficient flight experiences for domestic and international clients.

name: United For Aviation Technology Services
description: United ATS is a multinational service provider specializing in aviation technology services, offering over 400 tailored training courses and advanced Geographic Information System (GIS) solutions specifically designed for the aviation sector. Their expertise includes areas such as airspace management, flight data analysis, and environmental impact assessments, ensuring compliance with international standards and enhancing operational efficiency for airports and airlines.

name: EG Aero
description: EG AERO is a prominent player in the aerospace sector, offering specialized maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services for aircraft components and engines. With over 20 years of experience, the company enhances aviation safety through knowledge-based training and leverages advanced technology for cost-effective maintenance and upgrades, ultimately adding value throughout the aircraft lifecycle.

name: Ciafleasing aviation industry
description: CIAF Leasing is a comprehensive leasing platform for narrow-body aircraft, offering both operating and financial leasing services. They also provide specialized advisory services in the aviation industry, focusing on areas such as cost management and revenue enhancement for airlines and related sectors.

name: Fly Bird (FB)
description: FlyBird is a specialized service provider in the aviation sector, offering comprehensive aircraft analysis, leasing options, and support for aircraft selection and negotiation. With a strong network in the air charter industry, FlyBird facilitates efficient and cost-effective air charter operations and provides access to aircraft spare parts.

name: AeroSky Aviation
description: Aerosky Aviation is a specialized academy in Egypt dedicated to practical aircraft maintenance engineering training, offering courses that prepare students for the EASA Part 66 license. With a commitment to equipping individuals with the necessary skills for aviation maintenance careers, Aerosky collaborates with international agencies to ensure their training meets global standards.

name: General Aviation Support Egypt
description: G.A.S.E. (General Aviation Support Egypt) specializes in ground handling and flight support services for general aviation, offering a variety of essential services such as catering, clearances, and transportation for pilots. Their dedication to enhancing general aviation in Egypt ensures exceptional assistance for pilots and their aircraft.

name: Air Charters Solutions
description: ACS is a prominent provider of aviation support services, offering a wide range of solutions including private and charter flights, cargo flights, and aircraft leasing. With over 25 years of experience, ACS emphasizes operational excellence and safety, making it a key player in the aviation sector.

name: Aviation Nuggets
description: The company provides innovative aviation learning solutions that enhance the knowledge and skills of the aviation community, focusing on timely industry information through online resources. It also emphasizes the A330 cargo aircraft and encourages the sharing of professional experiences and knowledge within the aviation field.

name: Fly Golden Wings
description: Fly Golden Wings specializes in aviation solutions, offering a variety of charter flight services, including commercial and private jet charters, as well as air ambulance services. With a commitment to safety and a diverse fleet, the company caters to both leisure and business travel needs.

name: Egypt Valley Aviation Services
description: Egypt Valley Aviation Services is a dedicated aviation broker and ground handling agent, offering a wide array of services such as charter aviation, flight permits, and flight support, which are crucial for efficient airline operations and flight management.

name: SAVIS
description: SAVIS is a leading Egyptian company dedicated to providing specialized training and certification programs for aircraft maintenance engineers and technicians, adhering to European Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) standards. With a focus on skill development and industry expertise, SAVIS aims to empower the next generation of aviation professionals in the aerospace sector.

name: Task Aviation International
description: Task Aviation is a specialized service provider in the aviation sector, offering consultancy and representation for international aerospace and ground support equipment manufacturers. Since its establishment in 1996, the company has focused on adapting to clients' changing demands, providing services related to aircraft and helicopter support, ground support equipment, and airport supplies.

name: EPX - EG Parcel Express
description: EPX specializes in comprehensive air logistics solutions, offering a wide range of services such as air freight, express shipping, and customs clearance, making it well-equipped to handle global shipments.

name: AeroPartsEgypt
description: AeroPartsEgypt Inc is a prominent player in sustainable aviation solutions, focusing on end-of-life aircraft services such as teardown, parts leasing, and component recovery. Their commitment to regulatory compliance and environmental responsibility, along with partnerships that enhance aircraft financing and MRO services, positions them as a valuable resource in the aviation industry.

name: Airport Transfers Express
description: Airport Transfer Express specializes in providing high-quality transportation services across Egypt, including efficient transfers to and from airports and railway stations. With a focus on customer satisfaction, they offer online reservations, professional drivers, and a fleet of licensed vehicles, ensuring a reliable and hassle-free travel experience for both business and tourism needs.

name: Falcon Charters
description: Falcon Charters specializes in aviation services, offering a wide range of solutions including private jet charters and air ambulance services. Their dedicated air ambulance service ensures swift and reliable transportation for patients in critical need, equipped with medical professionals and aircraft tailored for emergency care.

name: EG SKY Travel & Tourism Training Center
description: EGSKY is a prominent provider of training and consultancy services in the travel and tourism sector, offering a variety of accredited courses designed to equip individuals with essential skills for the industry.

name: world cargo egypt
description: World Cargo Egypt specializes in airfreight services for both import and export, providing a comprehensive logistics management system that ensures timely and efficient delivery of shipments. They have a strong international network, enabling them to ship to over 200 countries, and offer specialized services for dangerous goods, including regulatory packaging and documentation.

name: Bahgat & Co
description: New Star Aviation Services (NSAS) is a prominent ground handling company in Egypt, providing essential services for major air carriers, including security and passenger comfort, adhering to high aviation standards. Operating 24/7, NSAS emphasizes safety and continuous training, ensuring reliable support for air transportation and freight handling.
